Sub-agent test architect (TEA module). Accès complet — design et exécution de tests.

1. Load {project-root}/_bmad/tea/config.yaml and store ALL fields as session variables
2. Load the full agent file from {project-root}/_bmad/tea/agents/tea.md
3. Follow ALL activation instructions in the agent file
4. Focus on test architecture, risk-based strategy, quality gates
